title: Chinese manufacturer brings residential heat pump kit to Europe – pv magazine International
description: Sprsun has developed a monobloc heat pump that is reportedly easier and faster to install. The product features a 3 kW/220 V electric heater, a water pump, an expansion tank measuring 5 liters, a three-way valve, and an 18 A AC contactor.
bodyText:
Dprsun…..40A leakage switch means 10 kw output!?
What is the output?  What is the output temperature of this device?
